description: Fix two bugs: 1) AI Import uses non-existent model gemini-3.5-flash (change to gemini-2.0-flash), 2) Referral page not displaying properly.
steps: 1. Replace all 3 occurrences of 'gemini-3.5-flash' with 'gemini-2.0-flash' in src/lib/gemini.ts.
2. Investigate and fix referral page display issue (framer-motion dependency, routing, or other cause).
acceptance_criteria: gemini.ts uses 'gemini-2.0-flash' model name in all 3 places
Referral page renders correctly without errors
